All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

Q

QFX - Enum constant in enum class nonprofitbookkeeping.service.FileExportService.StatementFormat
Intuit QFX (handled identically to OFX but preserved for clarity).
qty - Variable in class nonprofitbookkeeping.ui.panels.SalesAndCOGPanelFX.SaleRow
The quantity of items sold, as a SimpleObjectProperty of Integer.
QUARTERLY - Enum constant in enum class nonprofitbookkeeping.model.budget.Periodicity
Indicates that the budget amount is broken down into quarters.
query(TransactionQueryFacade.QueryConfig) - Method in class nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper.query.TransactionQueryFacade
Queries transactions according to the provided configuration and returns a lightweight record containing the transaction and the entries that matched the account filter (if any).
queryAndMap(TransactionQueryFacade.QueryConfig, Function<TransactionQueryFacade.TransactionRecord, T>) - Method in class nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper.query.TransactionQueryFacade
Queries and immediately maps the resulting records into bean instances.
queryBeans(Class<B>, String) - Static method in class nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper.runtime.ReportDataFetcher
Query beans and collapse rows into a single report bean.
queryBeans(Connection, Class<B>, String) - Static method in class nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper.runtime.JdbcBeanLoader
Query beans.
queryBeans(Connection, Class<B>, String, JdbcBeanLoader.SqlParameterSetter) - Static method in class nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper.runtime.JdbcBeanLoader
Run the given SQL using the provided connection, bind parameters using the SqlParameterSetter, and map each row to a bean instance.
queryFromTransactions(List<AccountingTransaction>, LedgerQueryCriteria, Function<AccountingTransaction, T>) - Method in class nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.datasource.LedgerQueryFacade
Query from transactions.
queryRowBasedBeans(Class<B>, String) - Static method in class nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper.runtime.ReportDataFetcher
Query beans and merge rows into a single report bean.
queryRowBasedBeans(Connection, Class<B>, String, JdbcBeanLoader.SqlParameterSetter) - Static method in class nonprofitbookkeeping.reports.jasper.runtime.JdbcBeanLoader
Run the SQL query and merge each row into a single bean using a row-based naming convention.
